title: cleistes uribei
intro: Cleistes uribei, also known as the Uribé orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cleistes uribei include treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Cleistes uribei is often used in the form of infusions, teas, or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
